# theorem monorepo

> Modular monorepo application with package boundaries and generated module docs.

## Priority Context

- `/AGENTS.md`: Agent workflow and coding rules.
- `/README.md`: Workspace commands and project overview.
- `/docs/monorepo-guide.md`: Monorepo structure and package boundaries.
- `/docs/ai/module-index.md`: Package map and dependency graph.
- `/docs/api/README.md`: Generated API docs from package public exports.

## Workspace Packages

- `@theorem/core` -> `/packages/core`
- `@theorem/feature-learning` -> `/packages/features/learning`
- `@theorem/feature-library` -> `/packages/features/library`
- `@theorem/feature-reader` -> `/packages/features/reader`
- `@theorem/feature-settings` -> `/packages/features/settings`
- `@theorem/feature-statistics` -> `/packages/features/statistics`
- `@theorem/feature-vocabulary` -> `/packages/features/vocabulary`
- `@theorem/ui` -> `/packages/ui`
- `@theorem/web` -> `/apps/web`

## Fast Validation Commands

- `pnpm typecheck`
- `pnpm build`
- `pnpm docs:build`
